title: Hasanamba temple
tagline: Hasanamba temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Hāsanāmbā temple is a Hindu temple located in Hassan district, Karnataka, India, dedicated to the Goddess Shakti, also called as Ambā or Ambe which means mother.
overview.description: Hāsanāmbā temple is a Hindu temple located in Hassan district, Karnataka, India, dedicated to the Goddess Shakti, also called as Ambā or Ambe which means mother. The temple was built in the 12th century CE. The temple is opened once a year during the Hindu festival Deepavali in October.

topPlaces.name: Hassan, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Hassan or Hāsana is a city, taluk and district headquarter of Hassan district in Karnataka state of India.

topPlaces.name: Sathyamangala
topPlaces.description: Satyamangala is a census town located at Hassan taluk in Hassan district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is near ka -state highway 71 (hassan-arsikere Highway).

topPlaces.name: Master Control Facility
topPlaces.description: The Master Control Facility (MCF) is a facility set up by ISRO in the city of Hassan in the Indian state of Karnataka. Established in 1982, this facility is responsible for monitoring and controlling geostationary and geosynchronous satellites launched by ISRO. This was the only Master Control Facility of ISRO till another one was established in Bhopal in 2005.

topPlaces.name: Agalahalli
topPlaces.description: Agalahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India, in the Hassan taluk of Hassan district.

items.note: Hassan or Hāsana is a city, taluk and district headquarter of Hassan district in Karnataka state of India.
Satyamangala is a census town located at Hassan taluk in Hassan district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is near ka -state highway 71 (hassan-arsikere Highway).

The Master Control Facility (MCF) is a facility set up by ISRO in the city of Hassan in the Indian state of Karnataka. Established in 1982, this facility is responsible for monitoring and controlling geostationary and geosynchronous satellites launched by ISRO. This was the only Master Control Facility of ISRO till another one was established in Bhopal in 2005.
Agalahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India, in the Hassan taluk of Hassan district.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hasanamba temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hasanamba temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hasanamba temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (97 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hasanamba temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hasanamba temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hasanamba temple?
faq.a: Stays in Hasanamba temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hasanamba temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hassan, Karnataka, Sathyamangala, Master Control Facility, Agalahalli.
